store.name: Wind & Wire Field Supply
store.tagline: Field recording kits for musicians collecting usable sound outdoors.
store.customer: Sample-based musicians, ambient artists, experimental composers, podcast sound designers, nature recordists with music instincts, audio hobbyists, and students building a first portable audio kit.

categories.name: Starter field kits
categories.description: First field recorder bags and complete creative kits for musicians who want cleaner recordings without piecing together fragile gear from unrelated catalogs.

categories.name: Capture hardware
categories.description: Compact microphones, handheld recorders, lavalier pairs, contact microphones, hydrophones, boundary mics, and small stereo bars.

categories.name: Wind and handling control
categories.description: Furry windshields, foam screens, shock mounts, pistol grips, suspension clips, soft recorder wraps, and tripod adapters.

categories.name: Field-bag infrastructure
categories.description: Coiled cables, right-angle adapters, labeled cable ties, weather pouches, memory-card cases, rechargeable battery sets, and small power banks.

categories.name: Logging and listening tools
categories.description: Closed-back monitoring headphones, field notebooks, slate cards, washable location labels, gain-setting cheat cards, and sample archive sleeves.

categories.name: Scenario bundles
categories.description: Subway rhythm, forest dawn, harbor hydrophone, found-percussion contact, rainy-window, and travel-light capture packs.

products.name: First Take Field Bag
products.summary: A first field recorder bag with recorder, soft wrap, wind screen, memory-card case, rechargeable batteries, cable ties, and gain-setting cheat card.

products.name: Alley Texture Kit
products.summary: Compact stereo mic, suspension clip, right-angle adapter, soft wrap, and slate cards for alleys, stairs, vents, and street percussion.

products.name: Forest Dawn Pack
products.summary: Furry windshield, compact stereo bar, tripod adapter, weather pouch, location labels, and power bank for long dawn ambience takes.

products.name: Found Percussion Contact Pack
products.summary: Contact microphone pair, washable location labels, coiled cable, sample archive sleeves, and field notebook for turning objects into instruments.

products.name: Subway Rhythm Pack
products.summary: Recorder, grip, slate cards, suspension clip, and compact accessories for train platforms, mechanical pulses, station air, and rhythm beds.

products.name: Harbor Hydrophone Pack
products.summary: Hydrophone, weather pouch, labels, cable discipline, and logging tools for creaking piers, dock wash, submerged knocks, and boatyard texture.

products.name: Rainy-Window Capture Bundle
products.summary: Weather pouch, soft recorder wrap, foam screens, batteries, and labels for rainy glass, sheltered ambience, and soft noise beds.

products.name: Travel-Light Carry-On Pack
products.summary: Compact recorder-bag configuration with power, card storage, small microphones, and cable discipline for musicians traveling light.

products.name: Compact Stereo Mic Pair
products.summary: Low-profile stereo capture for ambience, urban movement, and fast travel rigs.

products.name: Handheld Recorder Core
products.summary: A dependable recorder anchor for field bags, students, and first portable kits.

products.name: Contact Microphone Pair
products.summary: Pair of contact microphones for metal, wood, glass, and found percussion objects.

products.name: Harbor Hydrophone
products.summary: Submerged capture tool for piers, docks, rain runoff, boat knocks, and waterline texture.

products.name: Boundary Mic Tile
products.summary: Flat capture option for windows, tables, floors, and sheltered surfaces with minimal profile.

products.name: Furry Windshield Set
products.summary: Furry wind protection for exposed dawn ambience, platforms, harbors, and weathered outdoor takes.

products.name: Shock Mount + Pistol Grip
products.summary: Handling-noise control for walking alleys, piers, and crowded transit corridors.

products.name: Cable Discipline Roll
products.summary: Coiled cables, right-angle adapters, and labeled cable ties for fast and quiet field-bag setup.

products.name: Battery Planning Set
products.summary: Rechargeable battery sets and a small power bank for long ambience recordings and travel days.

products.name: Field Notebook + Slate Cards
products.summary: Handwritten take logging for location, gain, weather, mic choice, and creative use notes.

products.name: Closed-Back Monitoring Headphones
products.summary: Portable monitoring for checking wind, clipping, and handling noise before leaving the location.
